description: Clean and analyze the messy home inventory audit list by standardizing data, calculating expiration statuses, and applying conditional formatting to highlight expired or expiring items. Save a report containing waste pattern analysis and actionable insights to /home/ga/Documents/inventory_audit_results.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You've audited your home for expired items (medicine, food, personal care) and created a messy list. Clean the data by standardizing location/category names and date formats. Add columns to calculate days until expiration and status categories (EXPIRED/URGENT/EXPIRING SOON/GOOD). Apply color-coded conditional formatting (red=expired, orange=urgent, yellow=expiring soon, green=good). Sort by priority. Create a summary section showing total items, expired count, waste cost, and category analysis. Save as home_expiration_audit_cleaned.ods
